_doc: Synthetic fixtures hand-authored from the execute-query-failures playbook (Branch 7: wrong activity for the statement type -- Execute Query used to run a DELETE, empty DataTable, downstream Assign reading Rows(0) throws). Replace with verbatim captures from a real .local/investigations/ before treating as a regression signal (see ../_shared/scripts/generate_scenario.py).

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
